lineup_source: Iran vs Belgium, Group G, 21 June 2026 (4-4-2)

players.name: Alireza Beiranvand
players.note: Born into a nomadic Kurdish Lak family in rural Lorestan Province, Iran.

players.name: Ramin Rezaeian
players.note: Born in Samaskandah village, Mazandaran Province, Iran; no documented foreign parentage.

players.name: Shoja Khalilzadeh
players.note: Born in Bahnemir, Mazandaran Province, Iran, to a family of farmers and fish farmers.

players.name: Ali Nemati
players.note: Iranian centre-back with no documented foreign parentage.

players.name: Milad Mohammadi
players.note: Born in the Fallah district of Tehran, of Persian and Iranian Azerbaijani descent, family roots in Qazvin Province.

players.name: Mohammad Mohebi
players.note: Born in Bushehr, southern Iran; no documented foreign parentage.

players.name: Saeid Ezatolahi
players.note: Born in Bandar-e Anzali, Gilan Province; son of former footballer Nader Ezatolahi, also Iranian.

players.name: Saman Ghoddos
players.note: Born and raised in Malmo, Sweden, to Iranian immigrant parents (mother Simin, father Mohsen) from Ahvaz, Iran.

players.name: Mehdi Ghayedi
players.note: Born in Bushehr, Iran; no documented foreign parentage.

players.name: Mehdi Taremi
players.note: Born in Bushehr, Iran; father Alishah Taremi was a local amateur footballer and fisherman, also Iranian.

players.name: Shahriyar Moghanlou
players.note: Born in Zanjan, Iran, to an Iranian Azerbaijani family.
